subject: Update SDNC/CCSDK to Frankfurt RC2 versions
commit_message:
Update SDNC/CCSDK to Frankfurt RC2 versions

Update versions for SDNC and CCSDK dockers to reflect Frankfurt RC2
versions.

Issue-ID: SDNC-1171
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Iaf34379550d148a164341dac6c44fa20926b8ccb

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

CDS should be working now.  Also, updated entry point per Krzysztof's recommendation
(/opt/onap/sdnc/bin/startODL.sh instead of /opt/sdnc/bin/startODL.sh).  Either should technically work since /opt/sdnc is a symlink to /opt/onap/sdn, but cleaner to be consistent.
